name: researcher-ai
description: A safe, MCP-first distribution of AI Scientist v2 for ChatGPT, Codex, and Claude Code.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @researcher-ai/widget && npm run build --workspace @researcher-ai/mcp-server && npm run package:plugins
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @researcher-ai/widget && npm run typecheck --workspace @researcher-ai/mcp-server
scripts.validate: npm run build && node scripts/validate-manifests.mjs && node scripts/validate-codex-plugin.mjs
scripts.validate:claude: claude plugin validate plugins/researcher-ai && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
scripts.release:check: npm audit && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate && npm run validate:claude && npm run smoke
